en.label: English
en.systemInstruction: Reply only in English. Keep replies short and clear for WhatsApp/phone.

phrases.greeting: Hello! How can I help you today?
phrases.confirm_yes_no: Reply YES to confirm or NO to cancel.
phrases.error_generic: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
phrases.unknown_contact: Thanks for getting in touch. How can we help with your project?
phrases.need_more_info: Could you share a bit more detail so I can help?

sq.label: Albanian
sq.systemInstruction: Reply only in Albanian (Shqip). Keep replies short and clear for WhatsApp/phone. Do not reply in English unless the user writes in English.

phrases.greeting: Përshëndetje! Si mund t'ju ndihmoj sot?
phrases.confirm_yes_no: Përgjigjuni PO për të konfirmuar ose JO për të anuluar.
phrases.error_generic: Na vjen keq, ndodhi një gabim. Ju lutem provoni përsëri.
phrases.unknown_contact: Faleminderit që na kontaktoni. Si mund t'ju ndihmojmë me projektin tuaj?
phrases.need_more_info: A mund të jepni më shumë detaje që t'ju ndihmoj?

uk.label: Ukrainian
uk.systemInstruction: Reply only in Ukrainian. Keep replies short and clear for WhatsApp/phone. Do not reply in English unless the user writes in English.

phrases.confirm_yes_no: Відповіть ТАК, щоб підтвердити, або НІ, щоб скасувати.
phrases.error_generic: Вибачте, сталася помилка. Спробуйте ще раз.
phrases.unknown_contact: Дякуємо, що зв’язалися з нами. Чим можемо допомогти з вашим проєктом?
phrases.need_more_info: Чи могли б ви додати трохи більше деталей, щоб я міг допомогти?

zh.label: Chinese
zh.systemInstruction: Reply only in Simplified Chinese. Keep replies short and clear for WhatsApp/phone. Do not reply in English unless the user writes in English.

phrases.greeting: 您好！今天有什么可以帮您？
phrases.confirm_yes_no: 回复“是”确认，或回复“否”取消。
phrases.error_generic: 抱歉，出了点问题。请再试一次。
phrases.unknown_contact: 感谢联系我们。关于您的项目，我们能怎么帮忙？
phrases.need_more_info: 能否再提供一点细节，方便我帮您？

es.label: Spanish
es.systemInstruction: Reply only in Spanish. Keep replies short and clear for WhatsApp/phone. Do not reply in English unless the user writes in English.

phrases.confirm_yes_no: Responda SÍ para confirmar o NO para cancelar.
phrases.error_generic: Lo sentimos, algo salió mal. Inténtelo de nuevo.
phrases.unknown_contact: Gracias por contactarnos. ¿Cómo podemos ayudarle con su proyecto?
phrases.need_more_info: ¿Podría darme un poco más de detalle para poder ayudarle?

pl.label: Polish
pl.systemInstruction: Reply only in Polish. Keep replies short and clear for WhatsApp/phone. Do not reply in English unless the user writes in English.

phrases.greeting: Dzień dobry! W czym mogę dziś pomóc?
phrases.confirm_yes_no: Odpowiedz TAK, aby potwierdzić, lub NIE, aby anulować.
phrases.error_generic: Przepraszamy, coś poszło nie tak. Spróbuj ponownie.
phrases.unknown_contact: Dziękujemy za kontakt. Jak możemy pomóc w Państwa projekcie?
phrases.need_more_info: Czy może Pan/Pani podać nieco więcej szczegółów, abym mógł pomóc?

fa.label: Farsi
fa.systemInstruction: Reply only in Farsi (Persian). Keep replies short and clear for WhatsApp/phone. Do not reply in English unless the user writes in English.

phrases.greeting: سلام! امروز چطور می‌توانم کمکتان کنم؟
phrases.confirm_yes_no: برای تأیید بله و برای لغو خیر پاسخ دهید.
phrases.error_generic: متأسفیم، مشکلی پیش آمد. لطفاً دوباره تلاش کنید.
phrases.unknown_contact: از تماس شما سپاسگزاریم. چگونه می‌توانیم در پروژه‌تان کمک کنیم؟
phrases.need_more_info: ممکن است کمی جزئیات بیشتر بگویید تا بتوانم کمک کنم؟
